title: 在国外退菜别再说I don’t like it！🔥

cover.style_keywords: 简约插画风、牛排/刀叉图标、暖黄底色、手写字体

slides.correct_en: Could I please have this cooked a bit more? It’s still quite rare.
slides.correct_cn: 这牛排还很生，能麻烦再煎一下吗？

dialogue.a: A: Hi, sorry to bother — could I please have this cooked a bit more? It’s still quite rare.
dialogue.a_cn: A：你好，不好意思打扰一下——这牛排还很生，能麻烦再煎一下吗？
dialogue.b: B: Absolutely! I’ll get that re-fired right away.
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以！我马上给您重做。

slides.tip: 用‘It’s still quite rare’描述客观状态，比‘I don’t like it’更专业，服务员秒懂且不尴尬～

slides.wrong_en: This is not what I ordered!
slides.correct_en: I think there might be a mix-up — I actually ordered the grilled salmon.
slides.correct_cn: 可能有点小误会，我点的是烤三文鱼。

dialogue.a: A: Hi, I think there might be a mix-up — I actually ordered the grilled salmon.
dialogue.a_cn: A：你好，可能有点小误会——我点的是烤三文鱼。
dialogue.b: B: Oh my gosh, you’re absolutely right! Let me fix that for you right now.
dialogue.b_cn: B：天啊，您说得对！我马上给您换！

slides.tip: ‘There might be a mix-up’是万能缓冲句，既指出问题又给对方台阶下，老外超爱听～

slides.wrong_en: I can’t eat this! I’m allergic!
slides.correct_en: Actually, I need to let you know I’m allergic to nuts — could we possibly swap this dish?
slides.correct_cn: 其实我想提醒下，我对坚果过敏——这道菜能换成别的吗？

dialogue.a: A: Actually, I need to let you know I’m allergic to nuts — could we possibly swap this dish?
dialogue.a_cn: A：其实我想提醒下，我对坚果过敏——这道菜能换成别的吗？
dialogue.b: B: Of course! No problem at all — I’ll bring a new one and double-check the ingredients.
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以！完全没问题——我马上换一份，并重新核对配料。

slides.tip: 先‘Actually…’温柔铺垫 + 明确说明过敏源（nuts/dairy/gluten），比喊‘I’m allergic!’更清晰安全！

slides.correct_en: I’m afraid this has gotten a bit cold — would it be possible to have it warmed up?
slides.correct_cn: 这道菜有点凉了，能帮忙加热一下吗？

dialogue.a: A: I’m afraid this has gotten a bit cold — would it be possible to have it warmed up?
dialogue.a_cn: A：抱歉这道菜有点凉了，能帮忙加热一下吗？
dialogue.b: B: Yes, happy to! I’ll send it back to the kitchen for a quick reheat.
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以！我马上送回厨房快速加热。

slides.tip: ‘I’m afraid…’是英式委婉神器，听起来像在替对方操心，而不是指责 👌

slides.correct_en: Would it be alright if I just skipped this dish? I’d really appreciate it.
slides.correct_cn: 这道菜我可以不吃了，可以吗？非常感谢！

dialogue.a: A: Would it be alright if I just skipped this dish? I’d really appreciate it.
dialogue.a_cn: A：这道菜我可以不吃了，可以吗？非常感谢！
dialogue.b: B: Of course — no charge at all. Can I get you anything else instead?
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以——这道完全不收费。需要为您推荐别的吗？

slides.tip: 不说‘refund’或‘money back’，用‘skipped’+‘appreciate’软化请求，成功率up↑，还留好感！

caption: 说‘I don’t like it’可能让服务员秒变脸？😅 这3句（其实是5句！）才是老外真实退菜话术——不挑刺、不尴尬、不被当难搞客人！重点是：讲事实+给台阶+带感谢✨下次点错/过敏/牛排成血块…直接抄作业！👇你最常遇到哪种退菜场景？评论区蹲一个真实故事！👇收藏这篇，出国吃饭稳赢！#英语干货 #海外生存指南 #餐厅英语 #留学必备 #旅行英语 #实用英语 #生活英语
